function gmailMarkRead() { document.querySelectorAll('.gm-chk:checked').forEach(function(c){ var e=_gm.localEmails.find(function(x){return x.uid===c.dataset.uid;}); if(e) e.unread=false; }); gmailRenderLocalEmails(); }
function gmailToggleStar(uid, el) { var e=_gm.localEmails.find(function(x){return x.uid===uid;}); if(e){e.starred=!e.starred;el.classList.toggle('starred',e.starred);} }
function gmailCloseView() { var v=document.getElementById('gm-view'); if(v) v.classList.remove('open'); _gm.openEmail=null; }

function gmailForward() { if(!_gm.openEmail) return; gmailOpenComposeModal('Fwd: '+(_gm.openEmail.subject||''), '', '

--- Forwarded ---
From: '+(_gm.openEmail.from||'')+'
'+(_gm.openEmail.textBody||'')); }
function gmailTrashEmail() { if(!_gm.openEmail) return; _gm.localEmails=_gm.localEmails.filter(function(e){return e.uid!==_gm.openEmail.uid;}); gmailCloseView(); gmailRenderLocalEmails(); }
